32 #if (ROSCONSOLE_MIN_SEVERITY > ROSCONSOLE_SEVERITY_DEBUG)
33 #define ROS_DEBUG(...)
34 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM(args)
35 #define ROS_DEBUG_NAMED(name, ...)
36 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_NAMED(name, args)
37 #define ROS_DEBUG_COND(cond, ...)
38 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_COND(cond, args)
39 #define ROS_DEBUG_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...)
40 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args)
41 #define ROS_DEBUG_ONCE(...)
42 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_ONCE(args)
43 #define ROS_DEBUG_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...)
44 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args)
45 #define ROS_DEBUG_THROTTLE(period, ...)
46 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args)
47 #define ROS_DEBUG_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
48 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)
49 #define ROS_DEBUG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...)
50 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, args)
51 #define ROS_DEBUG_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
52 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)
53 #define ROS_DEBUG_FILTER(filter, ...)
54 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args)
55 #define ROS_DEBUG_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...)
56 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args)
57 #else
58 #define ROS_DEBUG(...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
59 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
60 #define ROS_DEBUG_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
61 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
62 #define ROS_DEBUG_COND(cond, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
63 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_COND(cond, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
64 #define ROS_DEBUG_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
65 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
66 #define ROS_DEBUG_ONCE(...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
67 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_ONCE(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
68 #define ROS_DEBUG_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
69 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
70 #define ROS_DEBUG_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
71 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
72 #define ROS_DEBUG_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
73 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
74 #define ROS_DEBUG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
75 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
76 #define ROS_DEBUG_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...) ROS_LOG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
77 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
78 #define ROS_DEBUG_FILTER(filter, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
79 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
80 #define ROS_DEBUG_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
81 #define ROS_DEBUG_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Debug, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
82 #endif

85 #define ROS_INFO(...)
86 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM(args)
87 #define ROS_INFO_NAMED(name, ...)
88 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_NAMED(name, args)

95 #define ROS_INFO_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...)
96 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args)

103 #define ROS_INFO_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
104 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)

106 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args)
107 #define ROS_INFO_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...)
108 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args)
109 #else
110 #define ROS_INFO(...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
111 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
112 #define ROS_INFO_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
113 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
114 #define ROS_INFO_COND(cond, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
115 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_COND(cond, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
116 #define ROS_INFO_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
117 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
118 #define ROS_INFO_ONCE(...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
119 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_ONCE(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
120 #define ROS_INFO_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
121 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
122 #define ROS_INFO_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
123 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
124 #define ROS_INFO_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
125 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
126 #define ROS_INFO_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)

131 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Info, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
132 #define ROS_INFO_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
133 #define ROS_INFO_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Info, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
134 #endif

137 #define ROS_WARN(...)
138 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM(args)
139 #define ROS_WARN_NAMED(name, ...)
140 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_NAMED(name, args)

142 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_COND(cond, args)
143 #define ROS_WARN_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...)
144 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args)
145 #define ROS_WARN_ONCE(...)
146 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_ONCE(args)
147 #define ROS_WARN_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...)
148 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args)
149 #define ROS_WARN_THROTTLE(period, ...)
150 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args)
151 #define ROS_WARN_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)

153 #define ROS_WARN_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...)

155 #define ROS_WARN_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
156 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)

159 #define ROS_WARN_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...)
160 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args)
161 #else
162 #define ROS_WARN(...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
163 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
164 #define ROS_WARN_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Warn, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
165 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Warn, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)

167 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_COND(cond, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)

171 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_ONCE(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
172 #define ROS_WARN_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Warn, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
173 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Warn, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)

175 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)

179 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)

182 #define ROS_WARN_FILTER(filter, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
183 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Warn, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
184 #define ROS_WARN_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Warn, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
185 #define ROS_WARN_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Warn, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
186 #endif

188 #if (ROSCONSOLE_MIN_SEVERITY > ROSCONSOLE_SEVERITY_ERROR)
189 #define ROS_ERROR(...)
190 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM(args)
191 #define ROS_ERROR_NAMED(name, ...)
192 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_NAMED(name, args)
193 #define ROS_ERROR_COND(cond, ...)
194 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_COND(cond, args)
195 #define ROS_ERROR_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...)
196 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args)
197 #define ROS_ERROR_ONCE(...)
198 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_ONCE(args)
199 #define ROS_ERROR_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...)
200 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args)
201 #define ROS_ERROR_THROTTLE(period, ...)
202 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args)
203 #define ROS_ERROR_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
204 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)
205 #define ROS_ERROR_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...)
206 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, args)
207 #define ROS_ERROR_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
208 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)
209 #define ROS_ERROR_FILTER(filter, ...)
210 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args)
211 #define ROS_ERROR_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...)
212 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args)
213 #else
214 #define ROS_ERROR(...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
215 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
216 #define ROS_ERROR_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
217 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
218 #define ROS_ERROR_COND(cond, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
219 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_COND(cond, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
220 #define ROS_ERROR_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
221 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
222 #define ROS_ERROR_ONCE(...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
223 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_ONCE(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
224 #define ROS_ERROR_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
225 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
226 #define ROS_ERROR_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
227 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
228 #define ROS_ERROR_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
229 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
230 #define ROS_ERROR_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
231 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
232 #define ROS_ERROR_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...) ROS_LOG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
233 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
234 #define ROS_ERROR_FILTER(filter, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
235 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Error, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
236 #define ROS_ERROR_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
237 #define ROS_ERROR_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Error, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
238 #endif

240 #if (ROSCONSOLE_MIN_SEVERITY > ROSCONSOLE_SEVERITY_FATAL)
241 #define ROS_FATAL(...)
242 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM(args)
243 #define ROS_FATAL_NAMED(name, ...)
244 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_NAMED(name, args)
245 #define ROS_FATAL_COND(cond, ...)
246 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_COND(cond, args)
247 #define ROS_FATAL_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...)
248 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args)
249 #define ROS_FATAL_ONCE(...)
250 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_ONCE(args)
251 #define ROS_FATAL_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...)
252 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args)
253 #define ROS_FATAL_THROTTLE(period, ...)
254 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args)
255 #define ROS_FATAL_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
256 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)
257 #define ROS_FATAL_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...)
258 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, args)
259 #define ROS_FATAL_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...)
260 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args)
261 #define ROS_FATAL_FILTER(filter, ...)
262 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args)
263 #define ROS_FATAL_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...)
264 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args)
265 #else
266 #define ROS_FATAL(...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
267 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
268 #define ROS_FATAL_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
269 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
270 #define ROS_FATAL_COND(cond, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
271 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_COND(cond, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
272 #define ROS_FATAL_COND_NAMED(cond, name, ...) ROS_LOG_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
273 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_COND_NAMED(cond, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_COND(cond, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
274 #define ROS_FATAL_ONCE(...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
275 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_ONCE(args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
276 #define ROS_FATAL_ONCE_NAMED(name, ...) ROS_LOG_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
277 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_ONCE_NAMED(name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_ONCE(::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
278 #define ROS_FATAL_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
279 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
280 #define ROS_FATAL_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...) ROS_LOG_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
281 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
282 #define ROS_FATAL_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ...) ROS_LOG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
283 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
284 #define ROS_FATAL_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, ...) ROS_LOG_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
285 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE_NAMED(period, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_DELAYED_THROTTLE(period, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
286 #define ROS_FATAL_FILTER(filter, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, __VA_ARGS__)
287 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_FILTER(filter, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, ROSCONSOLE_DEFAULT_NAME, args)
288 #define ROS_FATAL_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, ...) ROS_LOG_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, __VA_ARGS__)
289 #define ROS_FATAL_STREAM_FILTER_NAMED(filter, name, args) ROS_LOG_STREAM_FILTER(filter, ::ros::console::levels::Fatal, std::string(ROSCONSOLE_NAME_PREFIX) + "." + name, args)
290 #endif
291 

rosconsole
Author(s): Josh Faust
autogenerated on Wed Mar 2 2022 00:53:52
